meta.label: Board Game
meta.name: Don't Break the Ice
meta.short_description: Tap, tap, tap your way to victory, or a plastic ice-block crashing defeat?

boardgamehonor.name: 2004 Japan Boardgame Prize Best Childgame Nominee

boardgameversion.name: Milton Bradley-Hasbro Cootie Games Edition English 1999

reimplementation.name: Paw Patrol: Don't Drop Chase Action Game

alternatenames.name: Don't Break the Ice: Mammoth Edition
Wie een kuil graaft voor een ander

meta.description:
From the Hasbro edition box:

Tap out ice blocks one by one.
They won't melt when you are done!
Take your time and do some thinking
to keep the polar bear from sinking.
To win, the bear must stay on top.
One wrong block-he'll go ker-plop!

Children's game of tapping out 1" ice blocks in a plastic frame, with the goal being to force the other player to be the one that causes the central 2"x2" square to fall (taking the polar bear with it).
meta.wiki:
COMPONENTS (all plastic Hasbro edition):
1 Ice Tray Frame (light blue)
4 Ice Tray Legs (light blue)
1 Large Ice Block (white, 60x60mm)
32 Small Ice Blocks (white, 30x30x28mm)
2 Mallets (green, lavender)
1 Phillip the Penguin figure (Paris blue)

Rule sheet (2 p.)
